test_scenarios.given: An aws_db_instance with MySQL engine and non-default port 3307
test_scenarios.then: The policy should PASS because port 3307 is not the default MySQL port 3306

test_scenarios.given: An aws_db_instance with MySQL engine and default port 3306
test_scenarios.then: The policy should FAIL because port 3306 is the default MySQL port

test_scenarios.given: An aws_db_instance with MySQL engine and no port specified
test_scenarios.then: The policy should FAIL because the port will default to 3306

test_scenarios.given: An aws_db_instance with PostgreSQL engine and non-default port 5433
test_scenarios.then: The policy should PASS because port 5433 is not the default PostgreSQL port 5432

test_scenarios.given: An aws_db_instance with PostgreSQL engine and default port 5432
test_scenarios.then: The policy should FAIL because port 5432 is the default PostgreSQL port

test_scenarios.given: An aws_db_instance with Oracle engine and non-default port 1522
test_scenarios.then: The policy should PASS because port 1522 is not the default Oracle port 1521

test_scenarios.given: An aws_db_instance with Oracle engine and default port 1521
test_scenarios.then: The policy should FAIL because port 1521 is the default Oracle port

test_scenarios.given: An aws_db_instance with SQL Server engine and non-default port 1434
test_scenarios.then: The policy should PASS because port 1434 is not the default SQL Server port 1433

test_scenarios.given: An aws_db_instance with SQL Server engine and default port 1433
test_scenarios.then: The policy should FAIL because port 1433 is the default SQL Server port

test_scenarios.given: An aws_rds_cluster with Aurora MySQL engine and non-default port 3307
test_scenarios.then: The policy should PASS because port 3307 is not the default Aurora MySQL port 3306

test_scenarios.given: An aws_rds_cluster with Aurora MySQL engine and default port 3306
test_scenarios.then: The policy should FAIL because port 3306 is the default Aurora MySQL port

test_scenarios.given: An aws_rds_cluster with Aurora MySQL engine and no port specified
test_scenarios.then: The policy should FAIL because the port will default to 3306

test_scenarios.given: An aws_rds_cluster with Aurora PostgreSQL engine and non-default port 5433
test_scenarios.then: The policy should PASS because port 5433 is not the default Aurora PostgreSQL port 5432

test_scenarios.given: An aws_rds_cluster with Aurora PostgreSQL engine and default port 5432
test_scenarios.then: The policy should FAIL because port 5432 is the default Aurora PostgreSQL port
